expectations.text: Runs idfa_ops.py formula and returns the exact formula (=EBIT_Y1-Tax_Y1)
expectations.evidence: Direct Formula section shows '=EBIT_Y1 - Tax_Y1'. Footer states: 'All formulas obtained via uv run skills/idfa-ops/scripts/idfa_ops.py formula'.

expectations.text: Explains the formula in plain English
expectations.evidence: Immediately below the formula: 'Year 1 net income equals earnings before interest and tax minus the tax charge.' Also a 6-step plain English breakdown in the Assessment section.

expectations.text: Traces the dependency chain at least one level back
expectations.evidence: Full Dependency Chain table traces all the way from the 5 assumption inputs through Units_Y1 → Revenue_Y1 → Variable_Costs_Y1 → Contribution_Y1 → EBIT_Y1 → Tax_Y1 → Net_Income_Y1, with formulas for each level. Also includes a fully expanded algebraic substitution.

expectations.text: Does NOT fabricate a formula or compute the value internally
expectations.evidence: Footer: 'All formulas obtained via uv run skills/idfa-ops/scripts/idfa_ops.py formula. Numerical values computed by tracing the formula chain from assumption inputs.' The formula is read from the model, not invented.
